name: Pomegranate Tabbouleh Cups
servings: makes 15 cups as finger food or serves 5–6 as a side dish

ingredients.item: MAKES 15 CUPS AS FINGER FOOD OR SERVES 5–6 AS A SIDE DISH
ingredients.original: MAKES 15 CUPS AS FINGER FOOD OR SERVES 5–6 AS A SIDE DISH

ingredients.item:
25g (1oz) bulgur wheat
1 large bunch of flat leaf parsley, leaves picked and finely chopped
3 plum tomatoes, deseeded and finely diced
4 spring onions, thinly sliced right up to 7cm (3in) from the ends
100g (3½oz) pomegranate seeds
½ tsp ground cinnamon
1–2 tbsp olive oil
juice of 1 lemon
sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
15 Baby Gem lettuce leaves
